techcrunch.note: Use the TechCrunch article image as the default cover unless it is weak, distracting, or inappropriate for the Phoenix post.

techcrunch-ai.note: Use the TechCrunch AI article image as the default cover unless it is weak, distracting, or inappropriate for the Phoenix post.

the-verge-ai.note: Use the Verge AI article image as the default cover unless it is weak, distracting, or inappropriate for the Phoenix post.

inc.note: Use the Inc. article image as the default cover unless it is weak, distracting, or inappropriate for the Phoenix post.

entrepreneur.note: Use the Entrepreneur article image as the default cover unless it is weak, distracting, or inappropriate for the Phoenix post.

infoq.note: InfoQ article images often resolve to conference photos, slide decks, or diagrams. Review before using as a Phoenix cover.

openai-news.note: Use the official OpenAI image as the default cover unless it is weak, distracting, or inappropriate for the Phoenix post.

openai-platform.note: Official OpenAI platform/update images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

anthropic-news.note: Official Anthropic news images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

anthropic-research.note: Official Anthropic research images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

anthropic-engineering.note: Official Anthropic engineering images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

claude-release-notes.note: Official Claude release-note images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

claude-code-changelog.note: Official Claude Code changelog images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

heygen-updates.note: Official HeyGen product-update images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

heygen-new.note: Official HeyGen new-release images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

heygen-blog.note: Official HeyGen blog images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

deepmind-blog.note: Official Google DeepMind images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

github-changelog.note: Official GitHub changelog images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

cloudflare-ai-blog.note: Official Cloudflare AI blog images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

langchain-blog.note: Official LangChain blog images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

perplexity-hub.note: Official Perplexity hub images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

vercel-ai-sdk.note: Official Vercel AI SDK images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

huggingface-blog.note: Official Hugging Face blog images are public-safe only after the local cover audit passes.

matt-wolfe-youtube.note: Matt Wolfe videos are trend discovery inputs. Do not use YouTube thumbnails as Phoenix public covers.

futuretools-news.note: FutureTools is a trend discovery source. Do not use source images as Phoenix public covers without a separate review.

tensorfeed.note: Use the TensorFeed article image as the default cover unless it is weak, distracting, or inappropriate for the Phoenix post.
